cost_name: Engineering & Design — FEED + Detailed Engineering — 100 MW — Europe 2025

estimation.estimation_method: AACE 18R-97 factored estimate: engineering ~8% of total CAPEX for process plants. Includes FEED (conceptual + basic engineering), detailed engineering, 3D modeling, and as-built documentation.

confidence.rationale: Engineering percentage is well-established for process plants (AACE standard). FOAK projects: upper end of range (+20%). Hydrogen-specific: limited number of engineering firms with electrolysis experience → premium for qualified engineers.

primary_drivers: Regulatory permitting support (ICPE, Seveso safety case)

sources.title: AACE International 18R-97 — Cost Estimate Classification for Process Industries
sources.author: AACE International
